subject: Properties of Expectation
question: Two instruments are used to measure the height, $h$, of a tower. The error made by the less accurate instrument is normally distributed with mean 0 and standard deviation $0.0056h$. The error made by the more accurate instrument is normally distributed with mean 0 and standard deviation $0.0044h$. Assuming the two measurements are independent random variables, what is the probability that their average value is within $0.005h$ of the height of the tower?
